subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou art named Asghar, yet art intimate with the Covenant of the Most Great Name, while others bear the name of Akbar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد کن خدا را که بنام اصغری ولی محرم میثاق اسم اعظمی دیگران بنام اکبر لکن
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement
